messages.content: my laptop got stolen by a person named Rohit what to do now I have taken a picture of him but what to do
**Disclaimer**: This is informational guidance only, not legal advice.
"my laptop got stolen by a person named Rohit what to do now I have taken a picture of him but what to do"

**Recommended Steps:**

1. **File an FIR immediately** at the nearest police station with the suspect's photo and details (name: Rohit)
2. **Provide all evidence** – laptop bill, any witnesses, or CCTV footage if available
3. **Request police action** – they can use the photo to identify and locate Rohit

> ⚠️ **Note:** Under Indian law, theft is a *cognizable offense* – police can arrest without a warrant. Time is critical to increase recovery chances.
what do I have to do to do an FIR is there any specific steps of documents I need for it

---

### ⚠️ Jurisdiction Information Required

To file an FIR, I need to know **which city and state** this occurred in. An FIR must be filed at the **local police station** that has jurisdiction over the area where the crime took place.

Once you provide the city and state, I can guide you on:
- Which police station to approach
- What documents to carry
- What to expect in the process
I stay in Talegaon Goa local police station and nearest one is Panjim Goa

📋 DOCUMENTS REQUIRED TO FILE FIR (Goa):
=========================================
1. ✅ Written complaint/narration of incident (3 copies)
   - Date, time, place of theft
   - Description of incident
   - Name of accused: Rohit
   - Your details as complainant

2. ✅ Government-issued Photo ID (Original + 2 copies)
   - Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, PAN Card, Passport

3. ✅ Address Proof (Original + 2 copies)
   - Aadhaar Card serves both purposes

4. ✅ Contact Details (Mobile number mandatory)

5. ✅ EVIDENCE YOU HAVE (Very Important!):
   - 📷 Photograph of Rohit (the accused) - YOUR KEY EVIDENCE!
   - Laptop ownership proof (Invoice, Bill, Serial Number, Box)
   - Any messages/communication with Rohit

6. ✅ Witness details (if any)

7. ✅ Passport-size photographs (2 copies)

📍 WHERE TO FILE:
=================
- Since you're in Talegaon, Goa → File at Talegaon Police Station
- If they directed you to Panjim → File at Panjim Police Station
- You can also file online at: https://citizen.goapolice.gov.in (for mobile/laptop theft)

💰 FEES:
========
- FIR filing is FREE - No charges

⚠️ IMPORTANT TIPS:
=================
- Police MUST register FIR for theft (Cognizable offense under IPC 379)
- Get FIR copy free of cost (Section 154(2) CrPC)
- Note down the FIR/Diary Number for tracking
- If police refuse → Ask for written refusal, then approach SP or Magistrate

Code: ```py # Key documents and steps summary for filing FIR in Goa summary = """ 📋 DOCUMENTS REQUIRED TO FILE FIR (Goa): ========================================= 1. ✅ Written complaint/narration of incident (3 copies) - Date, time, place of theft - Description of incident - Name of accused: Rohit - Your details as complainant 2. ✅ Government-issued Photo ID (Original + 2 copies) - Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, PAN Card, Passport 3. ✅ Address Proof (Original + 2 copies) - Aadhaar Card serves both purposes 4. ✅ Contact Details (Mobile number mandatory) 5. ✅ EVIDENCE YOU HAVE (Very Important!): - 📷 Photograph of Rohit (the accused) - YOUR KEY EVIDENCE! - Laptop ownership proof (Invoice, Bill, Serial Number, Box) - Any messages/communication with Rohit 6. ✅ Witness details (if any) 7. ✅ Passport-size photographs (2 copies) 📍 WHERE TO FILE: ================= - Since you're in Talegaon, Goa → File at Talegaon Police Station - If they directed you to Panjim → File at Panjim Police Station - You can also file online at: https://citizen.goapolice.gov.in (for mobile/laptop theft) 💰 FEES: ======== - FIR filing is FREE - No charges ⚠️ IMPORTANT TIPS: ================= - Police MUST register FIR for theft (Cognizable offense under IPC 379) - Get FIR copy free of cost (Section 154(2) CrPC) - Note down the FIR/Diary Number for tracking - If police refuse → Ask for written refusal, then approach SP or Magistrate """ final_answer(summary) ```
agent_memory.observations:
Execution logs:
Last output from code snippet:

📋 DOCUMENTS REQUIRED TO FILE FIR (Goa):
=========================================
1. ✅ Written complaint/narration of incident (3 copies)
   - Date, time, place of theft
   - Description of incident
   - Name of accused: Rohit
   - Your details as complainant

2. ✅ Government-issued Photo ID (Original + 2 copies)
   - Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, PAN Card, Passport

3. ✅ Address Proof (Original + 2 copies)
   - Aadhaar Card serves both purposes

4. ✅ Contact Details (Mobile number mandatory)

5. ✅ EVIDENCE YOU HAVE (Very Important!):
   - 📷 Photograph of Rohit (the accused) - YOUR KEY EVIDENCE!
   - Laptop ownership proof (Invoice, Bill, Serial Number, Box)
   - Any messages/communication with Rohit

6. ✅ Witness details (if any)

7. ✅ Passport-size photographs (2 copies)

📍 WHERE TO FILE:
=================
- Since you're in Talegaon, Goa → File at Talegaon Police Station
- If they directed you to Panjim → File at Panjim Police Station
- You can also file online at: https://citizen.goapolice.gov.in (for mobile/laptop theft)

💰 FEES:
========
- FIR filing is FREE - No charges

⚠️ IMPORTANT TIPS:
=================
- Police MUST register FIR for theft (Cognizable offense under IPC 379)
- Get FIR copy free of cost (Section 154(2) CrPC)
- Note down the FIR/Diary Number for tracking
- If police refuse → Ask for written refusal, then approach SP or Magistrate
